verdict_reasoning: KLK2 is a secreted serine protease with a signal peptide but no transmembrane domain, GPI anchor, or documented covalent/wash-resistant surface tethering. It circulates as a soluble protease in plasma and extracellular fluids without a stable outer-leaflet anchor or documented non-baseline surface pool in cancer cells, during cell death, or in specialized tissues. Recruitment test: the protein remains in equilibrium with the soluble extracellular pool and is not wash-resistant to the cell surface.
